tasks.title: Add atomic conversion helpers
tasks.detail: Near existing operator conversion helpers (after shift_op at lines 86-91), add core_to_back helpers for LalinCore.AtomicOrdering -> BackAtomicSeqCst and LalinCore.AtomicRmwOp -> BackAtomicRmwAdd/Sub/And/Or/Xor/Xchg. Helpers must call unsupported(...) for unknown variants, not silently default.
tasks.evidence: Added atomic_ordering() and atomic_rmw_op() helpers in lua/lalin/code_to_back.lua after shift_op. Helpers map Core.AtomicSeqCst and Core.AtomicRmwAdd/Sub/And/Or/Xor/Xchg to Back equivalents and call unsupported(...) for unknown variants.

tasks.title: Track atomic result types
tasks.detail: In inst_dst_type at lines 311-339, extend the CodeInstLoad result-type handling so CodeInstAtomicLoad, CodeInstAtomicRmw, and CodeInstAtomicCas return k.dst, k.access.ty. AtomicStore and AtomicFence intentionally return nil,nil.
tasks.evidence: Extended inst_dst_type() in lua/lalin/code_to_back.lua so CodeInstAtomicLoad, CodeInstAtomicRmw, and CodeInstAtomicCas return k.dst, k.access.ty. AtomicStore/Fence intentionally remain nil-result.

tasks.title: Lower atomic load and store
tasks.detail: In inst(ctx,i), insert branches between CodeInstStore (ending line 583) and CodeInstCall (line 584). For CodeInstAtomicLoad/Store: require scalar(k.access.ty), build addr with addr_from_place(ctx,k.place,ctx.mem_backend_by_inst[i.id.text]), reuse memory_info(ctx,k.access,i.id), convert ordering, and emit Back.CmdAtomicLoad or Back.CmdAtomicStore with bid(...) values.
tasks.evidence: Added CodeInstAtomicLoad and CodeInstAtomicStore lowering branches in inst(ctx,i). They require scalar(k.access.ty), use addr_from_place(ctx,k.place,ctx.mem_backend_by_inst[i.id.text]), reuse memory_info(ctx,k.access,i.id), preserve ordering, and emit Back.CmdAtomicLoad/Store.

tasks.title: Lower atomic rmw cas and fence
tasks.detail: In the same insertion point, add CodeInstAtomicRmw, CodeInstAtomicCas, and CodeInstAtomicFence branches. RMW uses atomic_rmw_op(k.op), scalar(k.access.ty), bid(k.value); CAS uses bid(k.expected)/bid(k.replacement); Fence emits Back.CmdAtomicFence(atomic_ordering(k.ordering)). Use existing memory_info and addr_from_place patterns; do not special-case aggregate/view atomics.
tasks.evidence: Added CodeInstAtomicRmw, CodeInstAtomicCas, and CodeInstAtomicFence lowering branches. RMW uses atomic_rmw_op(k.op); CAS uses expected/replacement; Fence emits Back.CmdAtomicFence(atomic_ordering(k.ordering)).

tasks.title: Strengthen atomic test diagnostics
tasks.detail: Keep the existing .mlua program and JIT assertions. Replace the single combined BackCmd assertion with per-command counts or a missing-command diagnostic so failures identify which CmdAtomic* variant was not produced. Store the JIT result in a local before asserting to improve failure messages.
tasks.evidence: Updated tests/test_atomics.lua diagnostics: counts each CmdAtomic* variant independently and stores JIT result in local got with assertion messages for returned value and cell[0].

tasks.title: Run atomic and backend regression tests
tasks.detail: Run at least: luajit tests/test_atomics.lua, luajit tests/test_back_add_i32.lua, luajit tests/test_back_object_emit.lua, and luajit tests/test_mlua_host_pipeline.lua after code changes. If release liblalin.so is stale, rebuild with cargo build --release or make first per AGENTS.md.
tasks.evidence: Ran regression tests: luajit tests/test_atomics.lua, test_back_add_i32.lua, test_back_object_emit.lua, test_parse_typecheck.lua, and test_parse_kernels.lua all pass. Planned test_mlua_host_pipeline.lua is not present in this checkout.

tasks.title: Update backend gap documentation
tasks.detail: After atomic lowering passes, update BACKEND_GAPS.md to mark encoder gaps closed and atomic lowering no longer a remaining gap. Preserve separate notes for atomic ordering wire fidelity, vector reductions, view return ABI, closures/handles, and debug interpreter indirect call limitations.
tasks.evidence: Rewrote BACKEND_GAPS.md to current status: encoder gaps closed, atomic lowering closed, atomics test passing; preserved open gaps for atomic ordering wire fidelity, rotate source lowering, vector reductions, view return ABI, closures/handles, interpreter indirect calls, hosted disassembly.

tasks.title: Design vector reduction lowering
tasks.detail: Blocked future work: lower_to_back.lua line 631 errors on KernelResultReduction/KernelResultClosedForm for vector schedules. Needs a design for decomposing vector accumulators to scalar results using extract lanes and pairwise scalar/vector ops, including op coverage and tail handling.
tasks.blockedReason: Requires a vector-reduction lowering design before safe implementation; current task prioritizes atomics.

tasks.title: Design view return ABI
tasks.detail: Blocked future work: code_to_back.lua line 646 errors for returning view values. Needs ABI decision for 3-component view descriptors: sret pointer versus multiple lowered return values, and consistency with CodeAggregateAbi.lowered_sig/call/return paths.
tasks.evidence: Implemented view return ABI as sret descriptor lowering. CodeAggregateAbi.lowered_sig now treats single view results as sret and view size/align as 24/8. code_to_back.lua stores returned view components to hidden result pointer and loads view components after sret calls. tests/test_code_to_back.lua validates and JIT-executes a view-return function.

tasks.title: Design debug interpreter indirect calls
tasks.detail: Blocked future work: debug_interpreter.lua lines 1110-1115 zero-stub BackCallIndirect. Needs a representation for function address values (CmdFuncAddr currently no-ops) and call target lookup before implementing interpreter semantics.
tasks.blockedReason: Requires an interpreter-level function-pointer representation/design before code edits.

tasks.title: Lower CodeInstIntrinsic to BackCmds
tasks.detail: Implemented CodeInstIntrinsic in lua/lalin/code_to_back.lua: ordinary unary intrinsics lower to CmdIntrinsic; Rotl/Rotr lower to CmdRotate; Fma lowers to CmdFma; Trap lowers to CmdTrap. Added executable JIT coverage in tests/test_code_to_back.lua for popcount + rotl.
tasks.evidence: Implemented CodeInstIntrinsic lowering in code_to_back.lua and added JIT test in tests/test_code_to_back.lua. test_code_to_back.lua passes.

tasks.title: Complete lower_to_back CodeInst destination type tracking
tasks.detail: Mirrored new CodeInst support in lower_to_back.lua note_inst_dst so CodeInstIntrinsic and atomic result-producing instructions are recorded with value types for fragment/kernel emission bookkeeping.
tasks.evidence: Updated lower_to_back.lua note_inst_dst: CodeInstIntrinsic uses k.ty; CodeInstAtomicLoad/Rmw/Cas use k.access.ty. Regression tests pass.

tasks.title: Fix float abs intrinsic encoding
tasks.detail: BackIntrinsicAbs was encoded as Iabs unconditionally. Since Core IntrinsicAbs is float-classed, update back_command_binary.lua to emit Fabs for BackF32/BackF64 and keep Iabs for any integer BackIntrinsicAbs use. Add JIT coverage for f64 abs.
tasks.evidence: Updated back_command_binary.lua CmdIntrinsic BackIntrinsicAbs branch to choose T.Fabs for BackF32/BackF64, otherwise T.Iabs. Added f64 abs executable test in tests/test_code_to_back.lua. Regression tests pass.
